title: LeadSubmitResponse
description: Dealer agent's response to a `lead.submit.request`. Carries the assigned `lead_id` and overall lead `status`, plus an optional appointment block when the request included an `appointment` (the dealer can confirm the requested window, propose alternatives, leave it as merely requested for human follow-up, or reject the appointment while still accepting the lead). Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart via `SendMessage`.

status.description: Overall lead status. `duplicate` indicates the dealer recognized the same buyer/vehicle combination from a recent prior submission and merged it. `rejected` indicates the dealer did not accept the lead (e.g. consent invalid, vehicle no longer available, dealer not serving the buyer's region).

appointment.description: Present iff the request included an `appointment` block AND the dealer is acknowledging it (whether confirming, proposing alternatives, leaving it as requested for staff follow-up, or rejecting).

status.description: Appointment status. `requested` = received but not yet scheduled (staff will follow up). `proposed` = dealer cannot honor any of the requested windows but is offering alternatives in `proposed_slots`. `confirmed` = dealer scheduled the appointment for `confirmed_window`. `rejected` = dealer cannot host this appointment (e.g. service unavailable).

confirmed_window.description: Present iff `status` is `confirmed`. `start` and `end` are ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamps with timezone offsets.

start.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 confirmed-window start with timezone offset.

end.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 confirmed-window end with timezone offset.

proposed_slots.description: Present iff `status` is `proposed`. Time slots the dealer offers as alternatives. Each slot's `start` and `end` are ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamps with timezone offsets.

start.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 proposed-slot start with timezone offset.

end.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 proposed-slot end with timezone offset.

dealer.description: Convenience contact summary for the buyer agent to surface follow-up details to the user.

phone.description: E.164 phone number for buyer follow-up.

message.description: Contextual note from the dealer (e.g. 'A salesperson will call within 1 business hour.', 'We are unable to honor your requested time; please pick from the alternatives.').
